_comment: The ONE canonical source of published Stage-0 numbers. docs/RESULTS.md is rendered from this by surfscan/evaluation/sync_numbers.py — both the tables (between <!-- results:X --> markers) AND headline numbers restated in prose (inline <!--r:key-->value<!--/r--> spans, keys in NumberSync._refs) — so a number lives in ONE place and the docs can't drift (a test asserts render(RESULTS.md)==RESULTS.md). Curated from the measured investigation; refresh the measured entries from mlflow when reruns land. The root README stays a curated portfolio face (not synced) per CLAUDE.md.
harness: image-AUROC (detection) + pixel-AU-PRO (localization), per-category models, our runs through one harness

methods.name: DRAEM (synthesis-discriminative, crude Perlin) · bagel
methods.note: BAGEL-ONLY (not a 10-cat mean), 3-seed: 0.36±0.09 au_pro / 0.61 img (the earlier single-seed 0.48 was a lucky draw). My realistic synth v2 scored LOWER (0.18) because of BROKEN GEOMETRY (world-z not surface-normal displacement), NOT because realism hurts DRAEM. Fixed v3 (normal-displaced, core/geometry.py): 0.32±0.07 au_pro (tied) + 0.79 img (higher on all 3, decisively on 2). RESOLVED 2026-07-07.

methods.name: ↳ realistic-synth v3 (normal-displaced, on DRAEM) · bagel
methods.note: BAGEL-ONLY 3-seed. Surface-normal displacement (core/geometry.grid_normals) fixed the v2 z-axis bug: au_pro tied with Perlin (0.32±0.07 vs 0.36±0.09, bands overlap), img_auroc higher on all 3 seeds — decisively on 2, seed-1 a near dead-heat (mean 0.79 vs 0.61). See interpretations/synthesis/2026-07-06_draem-synthesis-comparison.md.

methods.name: PatchCore (feature memory bank)
methods.paradigm: memory bank — NN to normal features

methods.name: Fused (PatchCore-rgb + BTF)
methods.note: net-neutral vs rgb-only until native-res FPFH

sota.name: DCRDF-Net
sota.cite: DCRDF-Net 2026 (Sensors 26(2):412, doi:10.3390/s26020412, PMC12846035) — current top; M3DM CVPR2023 (0.945/0.964) is the classic reference. Field cluster 2025-26: MMRD 0.950/0.976 · Shape-Guided 0.947/0.976.

stage1_triad._comment: Stage-1 sim-to-real triad: ONE supervised defect-seg U-Net, all-10 rgb, ONE deterministic run per arm; the synth arm is EARLY-STOPPED on a held-out synth val (best weights restored). Only the label SOURCE varies; shared real eval half. Uncertainty = a MACRO (mean-of-categories, stratified) bootstrap over the eval set — au_pro [lo, hi] matches the reported point, NOT a cross-seed std. GAP + DA-CLOSURE carry a PAIRED macro bootstrap CI (run_triad). Refreshed under the early-stopped protocol (bead htg) — supersedes the earlier 3-seed, non-early-stopped numbers; the AdaBN story changed (see notes).

arms.note: train on synthetic defects (early-stopped -> no overfit to synth artifacts), test real. Stronger than the earlier overtrained 0.537 -> the gap is narrower

MEASURED-MARGINAL: +0.015 au_pro [-0.000, 0.030] — CI touches 0, NOT significant; ECE unchanged (0.075 -> 0.076, no calibration restore). On the already-strong early-stopped synth baseline AdaBN has little left to add. Reverses the earlier overtrained-baseline claim of a large closure + ECE restore
